rationale: The cited paper is used in the Discussion to provide a specific mechanism-based interpretation of the focal results on cross-national price elasticity. The citing authors explicitly draw on Steenkamp et al. (2010) to argue that stronger price-quality schema implies lower price sensitivity and then connect this logic to their country-level findings. This is more than a passing background mention because it supports interpretation of a key empirical pattern, even though the cited paper's model is not directly re-estimated or extended.
relation_description: The citing paper applies an insight from the cited paper - that stronger price-quality beliefs are associated with lower price sensitivity/higher willingness to pay - to interpret its own cross-national elasticity results. The cited study is used as mechanism-consistent evidence in the interpretation stage rather than as a direct methodological base.
